sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex6 = '00' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 is not null
update TransX set Flex6 = '10', Amt1 = Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 is not null
update TransX set Flex6 = '30', Amt1 = Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 is not null
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, TTY, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt3 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, TTY, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt4 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, TTY, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z003' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt3
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '00'
update TransX set Amt2 = Amt1, Amt1 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '10'
update TransX set Amt3 = Amt1, Amt1 = 0, Amt2 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '30'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 > 0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 < 0 or Amt2 < 0 or Amt3 < 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
update TransX set Txt = 'GIC QS Reval Clear', Flex6 = '', CC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,  Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,  Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt2) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,  Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
